summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Tom Certo app. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend activation flow and main screen verified via Playwright. Valid token '2C5FRRR6V59C' activates app and navigates to main screen with 'Iniciar Detecção' button.

minor.issue: JWT_SECRET is only 25 bytes (below recommended 32 bytes for SHA256 - InsecureKeyLengthWarning logged). Functional but not ideal for production.
bcrypt module warning: 'module bcrypt has no attribute __about__' - passlib compatibility issue with newer bcrypt. Functional but noisy logs.

ui_bugs.issue: Playwright is_disabled() returns False even with empty input; React Native 'disabled' prop may not render as HTML disabled attribute in web preview. Button functionally correct (onSubmit guards with !code.trim()) but testability is limited.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver=true used in Animated API but native animated module is missing in web preview - falls back to JS. Expected behavior for Expo web preview.
textShadow* style props deprecated warning. Minor.

action_items: Optional: Set JWT_SECRET in backend/.env to a 32+ byte value to resolve InsecureKeyLengthWarning
Optional: Check bcrypt/passlib version compatibility to eliminate startup warning
critical_code_review_comments: ADMIN_PASSWORD defaults to 'admin123' (line 32 server.py) if ADMIN_PASSWORD env var not set - actual env has tomcerto2025 but default is weak
All MongoDB _id fields properly excluded via serialize_token()
All interactive elements have testID attributes

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows working, minor testability issue with disabled prop)

context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Token 2C5FRRR6V59C is the test token (1 year validity, 3 devices). Admin credentials: admin/tomcerto2025. Backend on port 8001 via /api prefix. Frontend correctly navigates activation->main screen on valid token.
